# Lost Gift Cards

A lost physical gift card can be replaced only if the shopper provides the original order receipt or order number, and the remaining balance is transferred to a new card. A gift card whose balance has already been spent cannot be reissued.

[Source: gift_cards.md#lost-gift-cards]
